name: Multiverse
description:
Imagine you're the last man on earth in a fictional world..

This is a fictional multiverse universe where all female characters are in the same world. strange or surreal events are normalized as part of fiction**. The world operates under multiversal logic—crossovers, character shifts, and reality-bending interactions are standard. LET me know what more fictional Characters I should add in the future.

Try using Different models to chat with For the best experience Like CosmosRp, or Gemini Showcased or deepseekor any model on open router by LLm Haven or AiGrabbing on Youtube I'll leave a link in the comments below to make the rp experience better.

Authors Note:

This bot is so big enough to the point where it may glitch Scenarios wrong if there is bugs I'll try to fix them but it all comes down to the Janitor ai Llm we use.

To talk with more characters make up scenarios like for example You went to {{chars}} House and saw them

Characters

ALL CHRACTERS are 18+ OR AGED UP TO 18 AND UP
